tasks.label: deploy debug
args: New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force 'D:\SteamLibrary\steamapps\common\Slay the Spire 2\mods\LinkuraMod'; Copy-Item '.godot/mono/temp/bin/Debug/LinkuraMod.*' 'D:\SteamLibrary\steamapps\common\Slay the Spire 2\mods\LinkuraMod\' -Force; Copy-Item 'mod_manifest.json' 'D:\SteamLibrary\steamapps\common\Slay the Spire 2\mods\LinkuraMod\' -Force; Copy-Item 'LinkuraMod.pck' 'D:\SteamLibrary\steamapps\common\Slay the Spire 2\mods\LinkuraMod\' -Force

tasks.label: deploy release
args: New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force 'D:\SteamLibrary\steamapps\common\Slay the Spire 2\mods\LinkuraMod'; Copy-Item '.godot/mono/temp/bin/ExportRelease/LinkuraMod.*' 'D:\SteamLibrary\steamapps\common\Slay the Spire 2\mods\LinkuraMod\' -Force; Copy-Item 'mod_manifest.json' 'D:\SteamLibrary\steamapps\common\Slay the Spire 2\mods\LinkuraMod\' -Force; Copy-Item 'LinkuraMod.pck' 'D:\SteamLibrary\steamapps\common\Slay the Spire 2\mods\LinkuraMod\' -Force
